title: GitSwitchPreflight
description: The result of a read-only switch preflight check.

can_switch.description: True when a switch can proceed without `--force` (no blockers).

GitSwitchBlocker.description: One reason a branch switch is blocked, with the workspace-relative paths that triggered it.

GitSwitchBlockerKind.description: Why a switch cannot proceed: the worktree is dirty, or there is an unresolved merge conflict.

oneOf.description: The worktree has uncommitted tracked changes (staged or unstaged) that a switch would overwrite.
There is at least one unresolved merge conflict.
